title: Thomas Massie slams Republicans, Trump's ballroom after primary loss
shortDescription: Rep. Thomas Massie, the outgoing Kentucky congressman, bashed his fellow Republicans and Trump's White House ballroom on "Meet the Press."

title: No 'rush' to finalize Iran peace deal, Trump says
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's criticism comes after some conservatives raised concerns that the deal appears to be too favorable to Iran.

title: Alleged gunman killed in White House shooting identified
shortDescription: An armed man was shot and killed by officers May 23 after opening fire near the White House, the U.S. Secret Service said in a statement.

title: Suspect dead, bystander hurt in shooting near White House, Secret Service says
shortDescription: The gunman "pulled a weapon from his bag and began firing," according to the Secret Service statement. Officers returned fire, killing the suspect.

title: Trump says peace deal to end war with Iran is 'largely negotiated'
shortDescription: President Trump described a deal to come 'shortly' in a Truth Social post from the Oval Office, where he said he was speaking to Middle East leaders.

title: 'Hello, Greenland!' Trump still has eyes on foreign territory
shortDescription: The president used an AI-generated image to underscore his ongoing desire to "get" the world's largest island as talks on its future continue

title: See Trump's approval rating after winning week for Trump-backed candidates
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's has had his hands in several primary elections, and recently his candidates prevailed. What is Trump's approval rating?

title: Where in the world is Congressman Tom Kean?
shortDescription: The mystery of a New Jersey congressman's absence has consumed Washington for weeks.

title: Judge: Trump aides must follow Presidential Records Act
shortDescription: The Presidential Records Act is back in focus after a judge ruled Trump aides must comply with the law.

title: Trump announces 5,000 US troops to Poland, canceling out earlier cuts
shortDescription: Days before President Donald Trump announced that 5,000 more troops would go to Poland, the Pentagon said it was cutting nearly the same amount.

title: Donald Trump Jr. married for the second time, now to Florida socialite
shortDescription: President Donald Trump’s oldest son, Donald Trump Jr., has officially tied the knot with Florida socialite Bettina Anderson.

title: See Trump's schedule, news and other updates for Friday, May 22
shortDescription: President Trump is scheduled to appear in Rockland County, New York Friday. He won't go to his son's wedding. This and more in the Trump news rundown.

title: What to know as Texas votes in statewide, congressional runoffs
shortDescription: Texas voters head to the polls today for runoff races beyond the Senate fight, including attorney general, lieutenant governor and congressional contests.

title: Tulsi Gabbard resigns, citing husband's cancer. See her career in Trump's cabinet
shortDescription: Tulsi Gabbard is preparing to resign from her position as Trump's Director of National Intelligence. See her career in politics.

title: Trump says he'll skip his son's wedding
shortDescription: Donald Trump's eldest son is reportedly set to wed socialite Bettina Anderson over the weekend, but the president said he won't be in attendance.

title: Trump intelligence chief Tulsi Gabbard resigns, cites husband's cancer
shortDescription: As director of national intelligence, Gabbard oversees 18 US agencies, including the CIA and FBI. Her tenure has been marked by turbulence.
